$comment: Documentation artifact — the build validator (scripts/patterns.ts) is the enforcement point (D48).
title: Pattern
description: An authored composition recipe (D47): what to build, from what parts, with what parameters exposed to the consumer, and which named components in `compose` are known gaps (not yet in the manifest).

id.description: Unique pattern identifier; matches the filename stem by convention.

intent.description: One-line statement of what this pattern is for.

match.description: Natural-language phrases an agent can match a request against to find this pattern.

parameters.description: Consumer-facing knobs that bind `{param:key}` placeholders in `compose` prop positions.

key.description: Placeholder key referenced as `{param:key}` in a prop value.

ask.description: Question to surface to the consumer when resolving this parameter.

options.description: Allowed values; must be a subset of the literal union of every prop the param fills.

default.description: Default value, used when the consumer doesn't answer `ask`.

content.description: Text fills referenced as `{content:key}` (prop/slot positions) or bare keys (node `content`) in `compose`.

gaps.description: Component names used in `compose` that are not yet in the manifest — skipped by prop/slot validation.

patternNode.description: A single node in a pattern's `compose` tree: a component instance, its props (which may hold `{param:key}` / `{content:key}` placeholders), and its slot fills (nested nodes or string literals / placeholders).

component.description: Component name; must be in the manifest or listed in the pattern's `gaps`.

props.description: Prop values; string values may be `{param:key}` or `{content:key}` placeholders (legal only in prop positions).

slots.description: Named slot fills; each value is an ordered list of child nodes or string text fills (`{content:key}` or literal text).

content.description: Content key for this node's text children (bare key, not `{content:key}` syntax).
